description: Refactor the 'CustomerService' class in the 'ecommerce-legacy' project to resolve a Single Responsibility Principle violation. Extract the address-related logic into a new class named 'AddressValidator' within the same package. Move the 'VALID_COUNTRY_CODES' and 'zipCodePatterns' fields, along with the 'validateAddress', 'formatAddressLabel', and 'resolveRegion' methods to the new class. Update 'CustomerService' to delegate these operations to an instance of 'AddressValidator'. Ensure the project compiles and all tests pass.
